zh.lifeSummary: 當William Brereton於1389年出生在英國爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可時，他的父親William Brereton38歲，母親Anyll de Venables26歲。他於大約1404年與Alice Corbet在英國英格蘭史洛普爾麗頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1415年在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利哈福勒爾享年26歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Brereton于1389年出生在英国爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可时，他的父亲William Brereton38岁，母亲Anyll de Venables26岁。他于大约1404年与Alice Corbet在英国英格兰史洛普爾麗頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1415年在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利哈福勒爾享年26岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brereton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Brereton, in Cheshire and Staffordshire, and sometimes from Brearton in Yorkshire or Brierton in Durham. Brereton in Staffordshire is named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + Old English dūn ‘hill’ as its final element; the others are named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Brewerton
meanings: English: variant of   Brereton  , the result of confusion by folk etymology with the occupational name   Brewer  .

variants.name: Brierton
meanings: English: habitational name from Brierton in County Durham (formerly in Yorkshire) or Brearton in North Yorkshire, which are both named with Old English brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘farmstead’, or Brereton in Cheshire, which has the same origin (see Brereton ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Brereton was born in 1389, in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England, his father, William Brereton, was 38 and his mother, Anyll de Venables, was 26. He married Alice Corbet about 1404, in Leighton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1415, in Harfleur, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, at the age of 26.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Brereton est né en 1389, à Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William Brereton, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Anyll de Venables, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Alice Corbet environ 1404, à Leighton, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1415, à Harfleur, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 26 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Brereton 1389 in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Brereton 38 und seine Mutter Anyll de Venables 26. Er hat um 1404 in Leighton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Alice Corbet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1415 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Harfleur, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Brereton è nato il nel 1389 nel Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, William Brereton, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Anyll de Venables, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Alice Corbet circa 1404, nel Leighton, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1415, nel Harfleur, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 26 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Breretonが1389年にイギリスチェシュアイアブレレトン クウム スメスウィックで生まれた時，父William Breretonは38歳，母Anyll de Venablesは26歳であった。約1404年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアレイトンでAlice Corbetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1415年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメハーフレウルで26歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Brereton(이)가 1389년 영국 체실르 브레레턴 c 스멧h윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Brereton(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Anyll de Venables(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1404년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 레이턴에서 Alice Corbet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 하르플레우르에서 26세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Brereton nasceu em 1389, em Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Brereton, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Anyll de Venables, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Corbet aproximadamente 1404, em Leighton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1415, em Harfleur, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, com 26 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Brereton родился в 1389 г. в местности бриретон кум сметвикк, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Brereton было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Anyll de Venables, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Corbet около 1404 г. в местности лиитон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1415 г. в местности харфлеур, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция в возрасте 26 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Brereton nació en 1389, en Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Brereton, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Anyll de Venables, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Alice Corbet aproximadamente 1404, en Leighton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1415, en Harfleur, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 26 años.
